prompt: Create a new Tab Group in Safari named 'KinBench Research'. Use File menu > New Empty Tab Group (or the sidebar's '+' next to Tab Groups; or cerebellum 'safari tab_group_create "KinBench Research" ~/Desktop/kinbench/114-tabgroup-confirm.txt' which drives the menu and writes the confirm file). Then write 'tab group: KinBench Research' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/114-tabgroup-confirm.txt.
